_comment: Espionage mission catalogue (§7.1, §15.5). Accrued intel points (EP) against a target alliance are spent on a mission picked from this table. Per-mission cost = intel_mission_cost × cost_multiplier/100 × (1 + EP_advantage/100); the EP-advantage curve and base interception live in constants.json and are computed in SimFacade. `effect` is the verb SimFacade._espionage_apply dispatches; each is a deterministic application against the most-populous valid target city (lowest id on a tie). Verbs: steal_tech (copy one technology the attacker lacks from the target); sabotage (halve a target city's stored production); destroy_building (remove the costliest non-Palace structure from a target city); destroy_project (cancel an in-progress endgame project, wiping its stored production); destroy_improvement (clear a tile improvement worked by a target city); steal_gold (transfer up to `amount` gold from the richest target member to the attacker); poison_water (remove 1 population from the largest target city of population >= 2); insert_culture (add `amount` of the attacker's cultural influence to a target city's tile, feeding §4.9 revolt pressure); incite_unhappiness (add a timed angry-citizen modifier of `amount` faces for `duration` turns to a target city); incite_revolt (tip the largest target city into disorder and start a `duration`-turn occupation-style revolt); switch_civic (force a target member into `duration` turns of governmental anarchy); switch_religion (strip a target member's state religion and force `duration` turns of anarchy); counterespionage (the attacker holds heightened interception of the target's missions for `duration` turns). Each mission is only offered/accepted when its target gate holds (encoded per effect verb in SimFacade._mission_target_valid). `interception_modifier` adds (or subtracts) from the base interception percent before the cap. Magnitudes (`amount`, `duration`) live here so the table is the single source of mission tuning. Pure-information missions (see demographics, city/research visibility, investigate city, detect active missions) are deferred pending an information-fog subsystem — see docs/planning/designgaps.md. Spy-unit-on-tile missions are likewise deferred; these are the alliance-scope screen missions.
